Title: Verify user registration as vendor
Preconditions: User has the EcoFood app installed on an Android device with version superior to 8.1
Test Data: Valid vendor details (name, store name, contact information, store location)
Test Steps:
1. Open the EcoFood app
2. Navigate to the registration screen
3. Select the vendor option
4. Enter the required details
5. Submit the registration form
Expected Result: The user should be successfully registered as a vendor, and their store details should be saved in the app's database.

Title: Verify user registration as consumer
Preconditions: User has the EcoFood app installed on an Android device with version superior to 8.1
Test Steps:
1. Open the EcoFood app
2. Navigate to the registration screen
3. Select the consumer option
4. Enter the required details
5. Submit the registration form
Expected Result: The user should be successfully registered as a consumer, and their account should be created in the app's database.

Title: Verify store addition by vendor
Preconditions: User is logged in as a vendor, and the EcoFood app is installed on an Android device with version superior to 8.1
Test Data: Valid store details (store name, contact information, store location, store description, store category, store opening hours, store image)
Test Steps:
1. Open the EcoFood app
2. Navigate to the store addition screen
3. Enter the required store details
4. Submit the store addition form
Expected Result: The store should be successfully added to the app's database, and it should be visible to other users.

Title: Verify store search by consumer
Preconditions: User is logged in as a consumer, and the EcoFood app is installed on an Android device with version superior to 8.1
Test Steps:
1. Open the EcoFood app
2. Navigate to the store search screen
3. Enter the store name or location
4. Search for the store
Expected Result: The searched store should be displayed, and the user should be able to view its details.

Title: Verify product review and comment management
Preconditions: User is logged in as a consumer, and the EcoFood app is installed on an Android device with version superior to 8.1
Test Data: Valid product, valid review and comment
Test Steps:
1. Open the EcoFood app
2. Navigate to the product details screen
3. Write a review and comment for the product
4. Submit the review and comment
Expected Result: The review and comment should be successfully saved, and they should be visible to other users.

Title: Verify account management and personalization
Preconditions: User is logged in, and the EcoFood app is installed on an Android device with version superior to 8.1
Test Data: Valid account details (email, password, name, phone number)
Test Steps:
1. Open the EcoFood app
2. Navigate to the account management screen
3. Update the account details
4. Save the changes
Expected Result: The account details should be successfully updated, and the changes should be saved in the app's database.

Title: Verify background operation
Preconditions: User is logged in, and the EcoFood app is installed on an Android device with version superior to 8.1
Test Steps:
1. Open the EcoFood app
2. Perform an action that requires background operation (e.g., store search)
3. Minimize the app and perform other tasks on the device
4. Return to the app and verify the results
Expected Result: The background operation should be successfully completed, and the results should be displayed when the user returns to the app.

Title: Verify bug reporting and resolution
Preconditions: User is logged in, and the EcoFood app is installed on an Android device with version superior to 8.1
Test Steps:
1. Open the EcoFood app
2. Navigate to the bug reporting screen
3. Report a bug
4. Submit the bug report
Expected Result: The bug report should be successfully saved, and it should be forwarded to the development team for resolution. The user should be notified of the resolution status.

Title: Vendor Registration
Preconditions:
The app is installed on the device
The vendor has an active internet connection
Test Data:
Mail
Password
Name
Surname
Personal photo
Logo of the store
Store address

1. The user opens the app and is redirected to the registration module.
2. The user enters the required information in the registration form.
3. The user clicks on the "Register" button.
Expected Result: The account is registered and the user is granted access to the app.

Title: Vendor Login
Preconditions:
The app is installed on the device
The vendor has completed the registration in advance

2. The vendor enters the username and password in the login fields.
3. The app verifies the authenticity of the credentials through the database.
Expected Result: If the credentials are correct, the user is granted access to the vendor's section of the app.

Title: Vendor Profile Management

The vendor is authenticated in the app
The vendor's store profile is already created

Store information (name, address, etc.)
New images for the store

2. The vendor modifies the store information.
3. The vendor uploads new images for the store.
4. The vendor saves the changes.
Expected Result: The changes to the store profile are saved in the database and are visible to consumers.

Title: Product Publication

The vendor is authenticated in the app

Product name
Product description
Category
Price
Quantity available
Product images

2. The vendor fills out the product publication form with the required information.
3. The vendor saves the new product.
Expected Result: The new product is saved in the database and is visible to consumers.

Title: Product Update

The vendor is authenticated in the app

2. The vendor modifies the product information.
3. The vendor saves the changes.

Title: Manage Notifications
Preconditions:
User is authenticated in the application.
Internet connection is active.
System generates relevant notifications for the user (e.g., promotions, updates on preferred stores, or product alerts).
Test Data:
User is authenticated.
System generates notifications.
Test Steps:
1. User accesses the "Notifications" section from the main menu or receives a push notification from the application.
2. User views the list of recent notifications, such as promotional offers, updates on preferred stores, resolved issues, or new reviews on purchased products.
3. User can manage notification preferences, choosing which types of notifications to receive (e.g., notifications on promotions, store updates, issues, or reviews) and deciding whether to receive them via push or only within the app.
4. User can also delete individual notifications, mark them as read, or disable all push notifications.
Expected Result: User can view, manage, and delete notifications as desired.

Title: Save Stores and Products

Title: Navigate to Stores
Preconditions:
User is authenticated in the application.
GPS is active on the device.
Internet connection is active.
Stores are geolocalized in the app.
Test Data:
User is authenticated.
Stores are geolocalized in the app.
Test Steps:
1. User selects a store from the list or map.
2. User chooses the option "Navigate to Store".
3. User can view the store's location on an interactive map and select the "Navigate" option to receive turn-by-turn directions.
4. The app uses the user's current location (if available) or a manually entered location to calculate the route to the selected store.
5. User can choose to receive directions within the app or be redirected to an external navigation app like Google Maps or Apple Maps.
6. The route may include directions for driving, walking, or cycling, depending on the user's preferences.
Expected Result: User can navigate to the selected store using the integrated map or an external navigation app.

Title: Logout
Preconditions: User is authenticated and connected to the application.

3. During the logout process, user preferences and settings are saved in the database, and all notifications and relevant data are handled correctly to prevent loss.
Expected Result: User is successfully logged out, and all unsynchronized data is saved and synchronized.
